pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 23 confirms same URL used for Firefox startup
export_result.sh line 15 and verifier.py line 71 both reference this exact path
verifier.py line 27 uses identical default room names; cross-referenced with task description
verifier.py line 51 hardcodes check for evidence_size > 5000 bytes (5KB), not 50KB as claimed in metadata

privileged_info_summary: The task requires agents to join a Jitsi Meet meeting (version 9753, released September 2024) at http://localhost:8080/QuarterlyPlanning and create three breakout rooms with custom names: 'Revenue Strategy', 'Operations Review', and 'Product Roadmap'. Breakout rooms are real features in Jitsi Meet (introduced December 2021) with custom naming support (added August 2023). The agent must save a screenshot of the breakout rooms panel to /home/ga/breakout_rooms_evidence.png. Verification requires the evidence file to exist, be created during task execution, and exceed 5KB (not 50KB as metadata claims). All task URLs, room names, and file paths are correctly specified and match across setup, export, and verification scripts.
